heading: Governing body
label: 210104 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)21010436:4704 (1st par., last par. less regulations for membership).(1st par., last par. less regulations for membership), .May 31, 1920, ch. 216, § 441 Stat. 693The text of 36:4704 (2d sentence) is omitted as executed and obsolete.In subsection (b), before clause (1), the words “adopt and amend” are substituted for “adopt from time to time . . . and alter, amend, or repeal” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words. The word “rules” is omitted as included in “regulations”.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)21010436:4704 (1st par., last par. less regulations for membership).(1st par., last par. less regulations for membership), .May 31, 1920, ch. 216, § 441 Stat. 693The text of 36:4704 (2d sentence) is omitted as executed and obsolete.In subsection (b), before clause (1), the words “adopt and amend” are substituted for “adopt from time to time . . . and alter, amend, or repeal” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words. The word “rules” is omitted as included in “regulations”.

children.heading: .—Board of Trustees
children.label: a .—Board of Trustees
children.text: A self-perpetuating board of trustees shall manage and direct the property and affairs of the corporation.
the conduct of the affairs of the corporation.
